subject: To your point I guess....
body:
The story is out there -- but people have not directly linked it to Trump I guess...

https://quartzy.qz.com/1155494/theres-never-been-a-better-time-to-buy-a-50-million-nyc-dream-pad/

--
Landon Thomas, Jr.

New York Times
